services.title: Thesis & Dissertation
services.description: Undergraduate, Master's, and PhD level. Custom research, literature review, methodology, data analysis.

services.title: Odd Jobs
services.description: Accommodation finding, document processing, administrative tasks — any support you need.

faq.q: Is the work really mine to publish?
faq.a: "Yes. Upon completion, you receive full authorship rights. The work is yours exclusively — confidential, plagiarism-free, and never attributed to IPS or our team."
Pay per milestone. For a thesis: 20% deposit, then 20% per milestone. Work only proceeds after each payment is confirmed. No hidden fees, ever.
We accept all major currencies. Stripe auto-converts to your local currency at checkout. You see your price in your currency — we receive USD on our end.
Every client gets a private portal with real-time milestone tracking, file sharing, and direct communication with our admin team. Access via your unique Client ID.
Verified professionals with advanced degrees. Each writer is vetted, rated, and bound by strict NDAs. You never interact with them directly — we manage everything for your privacy.
Two free revisions per milestone, provided the request is within the original scope. Additional revisions are available at a small fee. Your satisfaction is our priority.

testimonials.text: I P S handled my entire Master's thesis. The milestone system made it affordable, and the final work was publishable quality.
Found accommodation in Belarus within a week through their odd jobs service. Professional, fast, and incredibly helpful.
Provides complete peace of mind. My PhD dissertation was original, well researched and delivered on every milestone.

about.headline: We Exist to Eliminate Barriers
about.p1: We believe every student, researcher, and professional worldwide deserves access to quality academic and professional services they can afford and trust.
about.p2: I P S operates as a professional ghostwriting and academic consulting service — legally analogous to hiring a speechwriter or memoir ghostwriter. We provide original, custom-written work as a work-for-hire, with full copyright transfer to you upon payment.
